title: The Ark Maxim Starts Moving
description: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something is... Floating above the upper yard...!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: God must be on that ship....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurry up and escape on the boats!

summary: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
